## Intent

<!-- Link the accepted issue or Discussion and explain why this change belongs in Tessera. -->

## User-visible behavior

<!-- Describe observable behavior before and after the change. Write "None" when appropriate. -->

## Validation

<!-- List focused checks and the complete quality gate you ran, or explain why a check does not apply. -->

## Documentation and changelog

<!-- Describe the documentation and Unreleased changelog impact, or write "None". -->

## Compatibility

<!-- Note affected platforms, APIs, migrations, and Breaking Changes, or write "None". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the accepted issue or Discussion.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for new observable behavior, or explained why none are
      needed.
- [ ] I considered documentation and changelog impact.
- [ ] I documented compatibility or Breaking Changes.
- [ ] I removed credentials, private logs, and other sensitive information.

Tessera is early and solo-maintained. Review and triage may be slow.
